original_problem: In the town of Azura, there are three switches, but they are not labelled. Each switch corresponds to one of three light bulbs in a room. Each light bulb is either on or off. You can turn the switches on and off as many times as you want, but you can only enter the room one time to observe the bulbs. How can you figure out which switch controls which light bulb?
deconstructed_problem: In the town of Azura, there are three switches, but they are not labelled. Each switch corresponds to one of three light bulbs in a room. Each light bulb is either on or off. You can turn the switches on and off as many times as you want, but you can only enter the room one time to observe the bulbs. How can you figure out which switch controls which light bulb?
original_steps: Step 1: Turn switch 1 to the 'on' position for 5 minutes to heat up the corresponding bulb.
Step 2: Turn switch 1 to the 'off' position and turn switch 2 to the 'on' position.
Step 3: Immediately enter the room to observe the bulbs. Take note of which bulbs are on, off, and warm (but off).
Step 4: The bulb that is on corresponds to switch 2.
Step 5: The warm bulb that is off corresponds to switch 1.
skeleton_steps: ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 1: Turn switch 1 to the 'on' position for 5 minutes to heat up the corresponding bulb.
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 2: Turn switch 1 to the 'off' position and turn switch 2 to the 'on' position.
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 3: Immediately enter the room to observe the bulbs. Take note of which bulbs are on, off, and warm (but off).
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 4: The bulb that is on corresponds to switch 2.
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 5: The warm bulb that is off corresponds to switch 1.
final_answer: The remaining bulb corresponds to switch 3.
